tagline: 互动网页课件 — 随堂测验 · 浏览器 Python 实验 · 每页留言 · 可选语音讲解

courses.title: Python for AI Research
courses.subtitle: 从 Python 基础、数据处理到 AI 科研项目展示的 15 节互动课程。

decks.title: Python Basics & Google Colab
decks.summary: Colab、变量、基本类型、type、print、input、f-string、命名规则与科研实验日志。

decks.title: Python Control Flow
decks.summary: 条件、循环、链式比较、enumerate、边界测试与传感器数据质量检查。

decks.title: Functions & File I/O
decks.summary: 函数、参数、return、scope、docstring、异常处理，以及 CSV 结果读写。

decks.title: Data Structures for Research
decks.summary: list、dict、tuple、set、切片、推导式与多组学样本记录管理。

decks.title: NumPy for Scientific Computing
decks.summary: ndarray、向量化、布尔索引、广播、统计与随机模拟。

decks.title: pandas for Data Analysis
decks.summary: 读取 CSV、DataFrame、筛选、排序、groupby、merge 与统计解释。

decks.title: Data Cleaning & Reproducible Decisions
decks.summary: 缺失值、重复值、类型、异常值、编码、标准化与清洗决策日志。

decks.title: Data Visualization & EDA
decks.summary: matplotlib、seaborn、分布、关系、相关性，以及从图表形成研究问题。

decks.title: Machine Learning Workflow & Baseline
decks.summary: 监督学习、特征与标签、train/test split、Pipeline、Dummy baseline 与交叉验证。

decks.title: Model Evaluation & Algorithm Choice
decks.summary: 回归与分类指标、混淆矩阵、ROC-AUC、残差、树模型和公平模型比较。

decks.title: Project 1 · Research Question & Dataset
decks.summary: FINER 选题、问题收窄、数据来源、变量字典、伦理与 AI 使用核查。

decks.title: Project 2 · Data Processing & EDA
decks.summary: 导入项目数据、清洗、编码、标准化、EDA 与处理决策记录。

decks.title: Project 3 · Modeling as a Tool
decks.summary: Baseline、线性/逻辑回归、树模型与选讲 SVM/XGBoost，统一框架比较。

decks.title: Project 4 · Evaluation & Research Report
decks.summary: 控制变量实验、调优、残差与特征重要性、限制分析和 IMRaD 报告草稿。

decks.title: Final Project Presentation
decks.summary: 最终项目检查、研究故事、5–8 分钟展示、Q&A、复现说明与成果提交。

courses.title: Python for AI Research (English)
courses.subtitle: A 15-class Python-first path from coding basics to small AI research projects.

decks.title: Python Basics & Google Colab
decks.summary: Colab, variables, basic types, formatted output, and a research log.

decks.title: Python Control Flow
decks.summary: Conditions, loops, boundary tests, and a sensor quality checker.

decks.title: Functions & File I/O
decks.summary: Reusable functions, return values, CSV files, and reproducible outputs.

decks.title: Data Structures for Research
decks.summary: Lists, dictionaries, tuples, sets, and structured sample records.

decks.title: NumPy for Scientific Computing
decks.summary: Arrays, vectorized operations, boolean masks, statistics, and simulation.

decks.title: pandas for Data Analysis
decks.summary: CSV files, DataFrames, filtering, grouping, and result interpretation.

decks.title: Data Cleaning & Reproducible Decisions
decks.summary: Missing data, duplicates, outliers, and a cleaning decision log.

decks.title: Data Visualization & EDA
decks.summary: Plots, distributions, relationships, and evidence-based research questions.

decks.title: Machine Learning Workflow & Baseline
decks.summary: Features, targets, train/test splits, simple baselines, and sklearn workflow.

decks.title: Model Evaluation & Algorithm Choice
decks.summary: Regression and classification metrics, error patterns, and fair comparison.

decks.title: Project 1 · Research Question & Dataset
decks.summary: FINER questions, dataset fit, variable dictionaries, ethics, and limitations.

decks.title: Project 2 · Data Processing & EDA
decks.summary: Project cleaning, preprocessing, EDA, and leakage checks.

decks.title: Project 3 · Modeling as a Tool
decks.summary: A baseline, one core model, and optional advanced model exploration.

decks.title: Project 4 · Evaluation & Research Report
decks.summary: Controlled experiments, limitations, reproducibility, and an IMRaD draft.

decks.title: Final Project Presentation
decks.summary: Final checks, a 5–8 minute research story, Q&A, and submission.
